title: Create OrderApi .NET 8.0 project with Order model
description: Create OrderApi project following UserApi/ProductApi patterns. Order model: Id, UserId, ProductIds (JSON array), Total, Status, CreatedAt

title: Add Orders table to database schema
Add CRUD endpoints for Orders
description: Implement GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints in OrdersController following existing API patterns

title: Add Orders API backend
description:
Create OrderApi (.NET 8.0 Web API) microservice:

Backend Components:
- Order model (Id, UserId, ProductIds, Total, Status, CreatedAt)
- OrdersController with CRUD endpoints
- Database schema for Orders table
- EF Core DbContext and migrations

Infrastructure:
- Add OrderApi service to docker-compose.yml
- Configure nginx gateway routing (/api/orders/* → OrderApi)
- Add OrderApi port (5002) to architecture

Follow existing patterns from UserApi and ProductApi.

title: Add navigation bar
description:
Add Material navigation bar with:
- Dashboard link (shows users/products management)
- Shopping link (shows shopping interface)
- Use Material toolbar and sidenav components
- Update routing for new pages

title: Add Orders feature
description:
Add complete Orders functionality:
- OrderApi (.NET 8.0) with Order model (Id, UserId, ProductIds, Total, Status, CreatedAt)
- CRUD endpoints following existing API patterns
- Database schema for Orders table
- Update docker-compose and nginx gateway
- Angular components: order list, create form, detail view

title: Add Angular Material
description:
Install and configure Angular Material:
- Install @angular/material and @angular/cdk
- Add a Material theme
- Convert existing UI components to use Material components (cards, buttons, tables, forms)
- Update dashboard, users, and products components with Material styling

title: Add shopping and orders flow
description:
Complete shopping experience (frontend only - uses Orders API from fullstack-test-app-6lc):

Frontend (Shopping page):
- User dropdown to select current user
- Product list with 'Add to Cart' buttons  
- Cart sidebar/panel showing selected items
- Checkout button that creates an order via OrderApi

Frontend (Dashboard):
- Orders section showing recent orders for selected user
- Order details (items, total, status, date)

title: Convert CSS to SCSS
description:
Convert all CSS files to SCSS:
- ui/src/styles.css → styles.scss
- ui/src/app/app.css → app.scss  
- ui/src/app/components/dashboard/dashboard.css → dashboard.scss
- ui/src/app/components/users/users.css → users.scss
- ui/src/app/components/products/products.css → products.scss
- Update angular.json to use SCSS
- Update component decorators to reference .scss files

title: Add Shopping Cart with Checkout
description:
Add shopping cart functionality:
- CartApi or extend existing APIs with cart endpoints
- Cart model (Id, UserId, Items, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt)
- Add to cart, remove from cart, update quantity
- Checkout flow that creates an Order from cart items
- Angular components: cart view, cart icon with count, checkout page
